rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
Sessions are the unit of work.

rules_evaluated.evidence: line:43 — 'JTBD hypothesis (Clayton Christensen's Jobs-to-be-Done pattern)' — named practitioner/author attribution in student-facing Key Concepts with no URL and no source-type label.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add a source-type label and URL for the Christensen JTBD attribution (e.g., [academic/research] with a link to the canonical source), or reframe as 'the Jobs-to-be-Done pattern' without naming Christensen if a primary source can't be pinned within the 6-month window.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on student-facing files with practitioner citations.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:43 — Clayton Christensen named as practitioner in Key Concepts. The maintainer block at line 87 addresses the access-trust gap stat but does not include a source-verification section for the Christensen attribution.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add a 'Source verification' line to the maintainer block covering the Christensen JTBD attribution — URL to check, fallback framing if the source doesn't hold ('three-part outcome statement' without single attribution).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Chain prompts by back-reference and deterministic path.
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight.
Overwrite anxiety — name the overwrite default on regeneration.
Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths, never naked filenames.
Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.

rules_evaluated.evidence: line:88 (maintainer) — 'Pattern catalog ships inside the Module 7 scaffold at patterns/personal-to-team-patterns.md' — the patterns/ directory does not exist in the agents-101 training directory. Student's Builder Claude is expected to read this file directly from the training directory, but it is not present.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Create the patterns/ directory and patterns/personal-to-team-patterns.md scaffold file, or update the maintainer note to mark this as a pre-cohort TODO with explicit creation instructions in pre-cohort-todos.md.

platform_claims_checked.claim: Start this module at the training-directory root.
Read everything in module-7/ ... and identify which single file is the sharing artifact
Overwrite the file in place at its current path in module-7/; do not create a separate version.

citations_checked.claim: Your memory already carries 80% of the teammate's job
